task_objective: fix: Add missing truncation warnings for correlations and missing data
design_decisions: Identified missing truncation warnings in Correlations and Missing Data sections for both themes.
Added conditional UI components to display warnings when the 'truncated' flag is set in the underlying model.
Ensured consistency between 'default' and 'ydata-like' themes in terms of warning visibility.
Rebuilt minified templates to include the new UI logic.
results: Reports now clearly indicate when correlation matrices or missing data visualizations have been truncated due to high column counts, improving user transparency.
